article.description: — Jalen Brunson scored at least 30 points for the fourth consecutive game, his season-high 40 leading the Knicks past the Orlando Magic 132-120 on Saturday and putting New York in the NBA Cup final.
article.headline: Jalen Brunson's season-high 40 points lead Knicks past Magic to NBA Cup final

images.caption: Karl-Anthony Towns drives in and finishes with contact for a tough layup.
images.name: KAT bulldozes to the basket for a Knicks and-1

article.linkText: Jalen Brunson's season-high 40 points lead Knicks past Magic to NBA Cup final
article.story: LAS VEGAS -- — Jalen Brunson scored at least 30 points for the fourth consecutive game, his season-high 40 leading the Knicks past the Orlando Magic 132-120 on Saturday and putting New York in the NBA Cup final. The Knicks, who have won five in a row and nine of 10, will play San Antonio on Tuesday night for the championship. Brunson also had eight assists and made 16 of 27 shots, including a 3-pointer in the third quarter after Orlando's Anthony Black fell backward onto the floor. Karl-Anthony Towns had 29 points and OG Anunoby scored 24 for the Knicks. Jalen Suggs scored 25 of his 26 points in the first half for the Magic before leaving in the fourth quarter because of a sore left hip. Paolo Banchero added 25 points and Desmond Bane scored 18. This game had a playoff feel with both teams playing physically and taking seemingly every opportunity to push the pace. The Knicks shot 60.7% and outscored the Magic 70-62 in the lane. The game was back and forth with 11 lead changes and 10 ties before the Knicks went on a 10-point run late in the third quarter to take a 102-92 lead. It appeared a little NBA history could be made when at halftime Brunson and Suggs each scored 25 points. No regular-season game has produced a 50-point scorer from each team since 2000. But Suggs scored just a point in the second half, and he clearly was hobbled. He went to the locker room early in the fourth quarter. The Magic played without Franz Wagner, who is out several weeks with a high ankle sprain. Up next Knicks: Play the Spurs on Tuesday night in the NBA Cup final. Magic: Visit Denver on Thursday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/NBA

videos.description: New York Knicks vs. Orlando Magic: Game Highlights
videos.headline: New York Knicks vs. Orlando Magic: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (New York Knicks vs. Orlando Magic: Game Highlights) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Josh Hart rises and swats Anthony Black's field goal attempt.
videos.headline: Josh Hart protects the rim for the Knicks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Josh Hart protects the rim for the Knicks) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Wendell Carter Jr. knocks down a 3-pointer for the Magic.
videos.headline: Wendell Carter Jr. swishes a 3 from the corner

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wendell Carter Jr. swishes a 3 from the corner) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Desmond Bane beats two defenders for an easy lay-in.
videos.headline: Desmond Bane muscles inside for a Magic basket

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Desmond Bane muscles inside for a Magic basket) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Suggs makes a layup in transition for the Magic.
videos.headline: Jalen Suggs pushes the pace for a tough lay

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Suggs pushes the pace for a tough lay) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Tyler Kolek pushes the ball for a Josh Hart layup then steals the inbounds pass and feeds Mikal Bridges for an easy Knicks basket.
videos.headline: Knicks score 4 points on wild sequence

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Knicks score 4 points on wild sequence) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns takes it strong to the basket for a Knicks dunk.
videos.headline: KAT attacks the rim for a powerful slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KAT attacks the rim for a powerful slam) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson drives to the hoop and puts it in for a Knicks basket.
videos.headline: Brunson freezes the Magic with a floater

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brunson freezes the Magic with a floater) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Mitchell Robinson stops Anthony Black from scoring with a massive block in the closing seconds of the third quarter.
videos.headline: Mitchell Robinson swats Anthony Black's shot attempt

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Mitchell Robinson swats Anthony Black's shot attempt) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Tyler Kolek throws a lead pass to OG Anunoby for a fast-break dunk.
videos.headline: OG Anunoby rises for a strong Knicks slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (OG Anunoby rises for a strong Knicks slam) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Mikal Bridges kicks it out to Karl-Anthony Towns for a 3-pointer.
videos.headline: KAT sinks a 3 for the Knicks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KAT sinks a 3 for the Knicks) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns throws an outlet pass to OG Anunoby who gets it to Mikal Bridges for a layup.
videos.headline: Knicks score without dribbling

videos.description: Anthony Black tumbles as Jalen Brunson creates space and knocks down a Knicks 3-pointer.
videos.headline: Jalen Brunson drops Anthony Black for 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Brunson drops Anthony Black for 3) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson notches his 19th 40-point game as a Knick to help New York reach the NBA Cup final.
videos.headline: Brunson drops 40 to lift Knicks to NBA Cup final

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brunson drops 40 to lift Knicks to NBA Cup final) 2025/12/13 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson slyly gets the ball to a cutting Mikal Bridges for a Knicks layup.
videos.headline: Jalen Brunson slips it to Mikal Bridges for a Knicks basket

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Brunson slips it to Mikal Bridges for a Knicks basket) 2025/12/13 ESHEET
